name: Scott Meier
kicker: CEO · Budsies, Petsies & Stuffed Animal Pros
seo_description: Scott Meier is the CEO of Budsies, Petsies, and Stuffed Animal Pros: custom-plush brands that turn drawings, photos, and ideas into stuffed animals. He builds the homegrown software that runs them. Based in Puerto Rico.
hero_lede: Consumer brands people love. And the quiet software that runs them.
hero_sub: CEO of Budsies, Petsies, and Stuffed Animal Pros: custom-plush brands that turn kids' drawings, beloved pets, and one-off ideas into stuffed animals you can actually hug. Plus the homegrown software that keeps it all running.
about_lede: Maker of things kids hug and grown-ups rely on.
about_paragraphs: I'm the CEO of Budsies, Petsies, and Stuffed Animal Pros: custom-plush brands that turn kids' drawings, beloved pets, and one-off ideas into stuffed animals you can actually hold. We're based in Puerto Rico and ship smiles worldwide.

I'm also a hands-on builder. When a process is slow or a number is fuzzy, I'd rather ship a scrappy tool than file a ticket: internal dashboards, ops apps, data pipelines, and AI experiments. The goal never changes: make the business clearer, faster, and a little more delightful to run.

We try to give back, too, through programs like the Budsies Pals Fund, which puts personalized plush in the arms of patients facing serious illness, and a Plushie Replacement Program for kids who've lost a beloved stuffed animal to disaster.
contact_sub: Ideas, opportunities, or just talking shop about plush, products, and scrappy software. The best way to reach me is LinkedIn.
